zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lauder of The Bass I於1330年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可時，他的父親Robert de Lawedre25歲，母親Alicia Campbell16歲。他於1385年與Helen Douglas在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安諾斯 貝維其可結婚。他去世於1425年6月14日在英國蘇格蘭享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Lauder of The Bass I于1330年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可时，他的父亲Robert de Lawedre25岁，母亲Alicia Campbell16岁。他于1385年与Helen Douglas在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安諾斯 貝維其可结婚。他去世于1425年6月14日在英国苏格兰享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lauder of The Bass I was born in 1330, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Robert de Lawedre, was 25 and his mother, Alicia Campbell, was 16. He married Helen Douglas in 1385, in North Berwick, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 14 June 1425, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lauder of The Bass I est né en 1330, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Robert de Lawedre, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alicia Campbell, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Helen Douglas en 1385, à North Berwick, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1425, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lauder of The Bass I 1330 in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Lawedre 25 und seine Mutter Alicia Campbell 16. Er hat 1385 in North Berwick, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Douglas geheiratet. Er starb am 14. Juni 1425 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lauder of The Bass I è nato il nel 1330 nel North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert de Lawedre, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Campbell, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Helen Douglas nel 1385, nel North Berwick, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 14 giugno 1425, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lauder of The Bass I(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Lawedre(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Campbell(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 노르스 버윅에서 Helen Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1425년 6월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lauder of The Bass I родился в 1330 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert de Lawedre было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Campbell, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Douglas в 1385 г. в местности норт бирвикк, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 14 июня 1425 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Lauder of The Bass I nació en 1330, en North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Lawedre, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alicia Campbell, tenía 16 años.
